dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9636 IH: Improving Clarity and Transparency for Unions Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Onder introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To amend the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 to require labor organizations to include results of certain audits in financial reports, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Improving Clarity and Transparency for Unions Act of 2026 or the Improving CTU Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 201(b) of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 431(b)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (5), by striking the and at the end;
in paragraph (6), by inserting and after the semicolon; and
by inserting after paragraph (6) the following:
the results of any audit of the finances or the financial transactions of the labor organization to which the labor organization has access;

subsection.text: Section 201(c) of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 431(c)) is amended by inserting after to all its members the following: by publishing such information on the website of the labor organization, or, in the absence of such a website, by providing, upon the request of a member of the labor organization, a physical or electronic copy of such information.

The amendments made by this Act shall apply with respect to any report under title II of the Labor-Management Reporting and Disclosure Act of 1959 (29 U.S.C. 431 et seq.) submitted on or after the date that is 6 months after the date of enactment of this Act.
